description: A visual money quiz using charts and shop scenes to support percentage reasoning.

questions.question: A toy costs GBP 50. It is discounted by 10%. What is the new price?

hint.title: 10% shortcut
hint.text: 10% of GBP 50 is GBP 5. Take GBP 5 away from GBP 50.

media.title: Toy shop discount
media.caption: Start with the original price, remove the discount, and keep what is left.

questions.question: You have GBP 80. You spend 25% of it. How much did you spend?

hint.title: One quarter
hint.text: 25% is one quarter. Split GBP 80 into 4 equal parts.

media.title: Pocket money split
media.caption: One of four equal parts is the amount spent.
media.label: GBP 80 split into 4

questions.question: A bike costs GBP 200. Its price increases by 10%. What is the new price?

hint.title: Increase means add
hint.text: 10% of GBP 200 is GBP 20. Because the price increases, add GBP 20.

media.title: Bike price increase
media.caption: The new price is original price plus the increase.

questions.question: You earn GBP 60. You save 50% of it. How much do you save?

hint.title: Half of the money
hint.text: 50% means one half. Half of GBP 60 is GBP 30.

media.title: Save half
media.caption: Saving 50% means splitting the money into two equal parts.

questions.question: A game costs GBP 40. It has a 20% discount. How much is the discount?

hint.title: Find 10% then double
hint.text: 10% of GBP 40 is GBP 4. 20% is twice that.

questions.question: You have GBP 120. You spend 10% on snacks. How much is that?

hint.title: Divide by 10
hint.text: 10% of a number is the number divided by 10.

media.title: Snack budget
media.caption: Move one tenth of the total into the snack pot.
media.label: GBP 120 total

questions.question: A jacket costs GBP 100. It is reduced by 30%. What is the new price?

hint.title: Take away 30%
hint.text: 30% of GBP 100 is GBP 30. Reduced means subtract it.

questions.question: You get GBP 90 pocket money. You spend 1/3 of it. What percentage is that closest to?

hint.title: Thirds become about 33%
hint.text: One whole is 100%. One third is about 100 divided by 3.

media.title: One third of a whole
media.caption: A third is close to 33 out of 100.

questions.question: A phone costs GBP 300. VAT adds 20%. What is the total price?

hint.title: VAT is added
hint.text: 20% of GBP 300 is GBP 60. Add that to GBP 300.

questions.question: You have GBP 150. You save 20%. How much do you save?

hint.title: Use 10% twice
hint.text: 10% of GBP 150 is GBP 15. 20% is two lots of GBP 15.
